name: codex-browser-recorder
description: Save one approved Codex Browser test flow as a local H.264 MP4 with a visible cursor.

interface.shortDescription: Save a Browser flow as MP4 with a visible cursor.
interface.longDescription: Saves one approved Codex Browser test flow with visible cursor and click feedback as a validated, audio-free H.264 MP4 in a user-visible local folder.
capabilities: Local Browser test-flow recording with a visible cursor
defaultPrompt: Use $record-browser to record one approved non-sensitive flow on a public HTTPS test page.
Use $record-browser to save one approved same-origin navigation flow as a local MP4.
Use $record-browser to record one approved pointer-driven Browser flow with a visible cursor.
